Match Injuries to a Ratings Data Frame

Source: R/injuries_match.R
match_injuries.Rd

Joins injury data to any data frame containing a player_name column (e.g., TORP ratings). Matching uses normalized names for robustness.

Usage

match_injuries(ratings_df, injuries_df)

Arguments

ratings_df

A data.frame with a player_name column.

injuries_df

A data.frame from get_all_injuries() or scrape_injuries() with a player_norm column.

Value

The input ratings_df with injury and estimated_return columns added. Healthy players have NA values.
